name: Black Bean Casserole Ole (Lacto)
recipeIngredient: 16 oz Whole kernel corn, canned, rinse/d
4 oz Canned diced mild green chil
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Lightly spray an 8-inch square baking pan with non-stick spray.
3. In a large bowl, combine all ingredients and mix well.
4. Place the mixture in the prepared pan.
5. Bake uncovered for 45 minutes.
